targets.notes: Corporate commitment to reach net-zero carbon by 2040 (The Climate Pledge); specific SBTi-style scope coverage and quantified reduction vs a base year not stated here.
targets.title: The Climate Pledge: net-zero carbon by 2040

targets.notes: Program goal stated as making 50% of shipments net-zero carbon by 2030; not expressed as a company-wide % emissions reduction versus a base year.
targets.title: Shipment Zero: net-zero carbon for 50% of shipments by 2030
